sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105750" key="trufero/fqalmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῠφερ-όφθαλμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with weak eyes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
